svg.title: Coupon Debugging Multi-Level Fork Tree
svg.desc: A prepared parent branches into hypotheses; the winning contract branch writes state before deeper forks.
svg.text: A prepared parent branches into hypotheses; the winning contract branch writes state before deeper forks.

svg.text: The contract branch writes a candidate fix, then becomes the parent for validators and refinements.
